title: Ennamma Irukkadaa Lyrics Pon Ondru Kanden
stanzas:
Ennamma ennammaa irukkaadaa
moththama moththama kavuthaadaa
thangama thangama jolichaadaa
bodha kaadaa

konjamaa konjamaa sirichaadaa
bangamaa bangamaa mudichaadaa
engammaa polave azhagaa irukaadaa

ava nenappaa iruken thaviken
ava morachaa muliyaa mulikken
ava nadakkum vazhiyil thenamum
alaiyuren naanum

ava imaiyaa porakka thudikken
ava kanavaa kadatha nenaikken
atha nadathi mudippen koduppen
rasippen, thenam thenam thaanguveney

Ennamma ennammaa irukkaadaa
moththama moththama kavuthaadaa
thangama thangama jolichaadaa
bodha kaadaa

modhavaati puriyala perusaa
manasoda orasuraa dhinusaa
uyirellaam olappuraa kalakkuraa
pudhusaaga porantheney

alaiyaame veetukkula irundhum
palavaati kulikkuren thinamum
azhaga naan kolamburen kudhukkuren
unnaale

appappa oru paarvaiyathaan vachcha
kannukkulla niyabagama thachchaa
enna venummnu ennai kettaa
unna mattumthaan kaetpen

thappu onnu senju maatru vethanaiya
thaniye naan paakuren eppodhum
oruvaati nee vaadi seralaamadi

Ennamma ennammaa irukkaadaa
moththama moththama kavuthaadaa
thangama thangama jolichaadaa
bodha kaadaa

konjamaa konjamaa sirichaadaa
bangamaa bangamaa mudichaadaa
engammaa polave azhagaa irukaadaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ennamma Irukkadaa expresses feelings of love and admiration, capturing the essence of romance.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie for Ennamma Irukkadaa is currently unknown.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan.

When was the song released?

The song was released on April 5, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennamma Irukkadaa, Yuvan delivers a captivating performance that encapsulates the joy and excitement of love. The song's upbeat tempo and romantic lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration, making it ideal for weddings and parties. It conveys a sense of admiration and affection, evoking feelings of happiness and energy. This track is sure to become a favorite among fans of romantic Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennamma Irukkadaa is a vibrant and catchy melody that showcases Yuvan's unique musical style, blending romance with an upbeat vibe. This song is sure to resonate with listeners, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Experience the magic of Yuvan's vocals and composition in this delightful track!
stanzaMeanings: What is this feeling? Is it all just a joke? Is it a trick or a game?
Is it just a little smile or a big laugh? Is it as beautiful as my mother?
I have her in my thoughts, she walks in my mind, and in the path she walks, sweetness flows.
She is a dream I chase, I think of her often, I will make it happen, I will give it to her, I will hold on to the sweetness.
What is this feeling? Is it all just a joke? Is it a trick or a game?
I don't understand the beginning, it's too much for my mind, everything is confusing, I am going through something new.
Even at home, I am feeling the waves, every day I am beautiful, I am enjoying because of you.
Oh my, just one glance, in my eyes, I remember, if you ask me what I want, I will only ask for you.
I will take one mistake and change it, I am looking for my own path, always alone, you can come along if you want.
What is this feeling? Is it all just a joke? Is it a trick or a game?
Is it just a little smile or a big laugh? Is it as beautiful as my mother?
